message:
chore: add ACFS ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add standard patterns for core dumps, MCP config files and backups,
agent-mail project IDs, SQLite corruption/repair artifacts, and beads
DB recovery snapshots to prevent these recurring auto-generated files
from appearing as untracked noise in multi-agent environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -98,3 +98,26 @@ rustc-ice-*.txt
 *.snap.new
 sweep_*.png
 test_screenshot.png
+
+# ACFS ephemeral patterns (auto-generated agent artifacts)
+core
+core.*
+cline.mcp.json
+codex.mcp.json
+cursor.mcp.json
+gemini.mcp.json
+opencode.json
+windsurf.mcp.json
+*.mcp.json.*.bak
+.opencode.json.*.bak
+.windsurf.mcp.json.*.bak
+.agent-mail-project-id
+.agent-mail.yaml
+*.sqlite3.corrupt*
+storage.sqlite3.corrupt-*
+storage.sqlite3-shm.corrupt-*
+storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
+.beads/*.corrupt*
+.beads/*.pre_repair_*
+.beads/*.repair_candidate_*
+.beads/*.bak-corrupt
